comment.body: WAs going over some more signals to figure out if i can get a realtime indiator on the "10x meme trade" that we've been seeing at market close last week. This past friday alma mentioned it wouldn't have broken 5800 without increasing vol (i was saying it wouldn't do that because of charm + gamma) but this image shows a rising RV into the close so the question is, what "rising vol" is considered enough of a rise in vol to push through supports?
